verdict_reason: The engineering layer treats the verse with appropriate gravity. Crucially, it explicitly distances itself from metaphysical bravado ('the framing the śloka establishes is not metaphysical bravado; it is a discipline of recognition'). This is the right tonal move — the verse is making a metaphysical claim about Self-eternality in the original; the engineering layer is making an analogical claim about durable customer requirements, and the explicit acknowledgment of register substitution prevents the verse's gravity from being trivialized. A serious practitioner would recognize that the engineering layer is using the verse's structure (three-times eternality) without claiming the verse 'really' means custodianship-under-team-turnover.
